title: Response Methods in Express
content:
### res.send()

Sends a response of various types:

```javascript
res.send('Hello World');     // HTML string
res.send({ user: 'John' }); // Object to JSON
res.send(Buffer.from('hi'));// Buffer
```

### res.json()

Sends a JSON response:

```javascript
res.json({ success: true, data: users });
```

### res.status()

Sets the HTTP status code. Chainable:

```javascript
res.status(201).json({ id: 1 });
res.status(404).send('Not found');
res.status(500).json({ error: 'Server error' });
```

### res.redirect()

Redirects the client:

```javascript
res.redirect('/login');
res.redirect(301, '/new-url');
```

### res.render()

Renders a template view:

```javascript
res.render('index', { title: 'Home', user: currentUser });
```

### res.sendFile()

Sends a file:

```javascript
res.sendFile('/path/to/file.pdf');
```

### res.download()

Prompts file download:

```javascript
res.download('/path/to/report.pdf', 'report.pdf');
```

### res.set()

Sets response headers:

```javascript
res.set('X-Custom-Header', 'value');
res.set({ 'X-API-Key': 'abc', 'X-Rate-Limit': '100' });
```

quiz.question: Which method sends a file for download with a prompt?
Which method sets the HTTP status code and can be chained?
